52045.title: Bargain Hunt : Newark 21
52045.description: Natasha Raskin presents from the market town of Newark in Nottinghamshire, where she is joined by experts Kate Bliss and Gary Pe. The teams are made up of two married couples, and each buy three items which they hope will make them a profit at auction.
